'''kazoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackerbread|crackerbread]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-z-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackerbread|crackerbread]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| kazoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kæzeheth|kæzeheth]] || [[word:kæzehej|kæzehej]] || [[word:kæzehesh|kæzehesh]] || [[word:kæzehe|kæzehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kazozohoth|kazozohoth]] || [[word:kazozohoj|kazozohoj]] || [[word:kazozohosh|kazozohosh]] || [[word:kazozoho|kazozoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kazohoth|kazohoth]] || [[word:kazohoj|kazohoj]] || [[word:kazohosh|kazohosh]] || [[word:kazoho|kazoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kazofhoth|kazofhoth]] || [[word:kazofhoj|kazofhoj]] || [[word:kazofhosh|kazofhosh]] || [[word:kazofhof|kazofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:kazohotho|kazohotho]] || [[word:kazohojo|kazohojo]] || [[word:kazohosho|kazohosho]] || [[word:kazohoko|kazohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:kazohoth|kazohoth]] || [[word:kazohoj|kazohoj]] || [[word:kazohosh|kazohosh]] || [[word:kazoho|kazoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:kazohothol|kazohothol]] || [[word:kazohojol|kazohojol]] || [[word:kazohoshol|kazohoshol]] || [[word:kazohokol|kazohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:kazohothotho|kazohothotho]] || [[word:kazohojojo|kazohojojo]] || [[word:kazohoshosho|kazohoshosho]] || [[word:kazohoko|kazohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:kazohothon|kazohothon]] || [[word:kazohojon|kazohojon]] || [[word:kazohoshon|kazohoshon]] || [[word:kazohokon|kazohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:kazohothoro|kazohothoro]] || [[word:kazohojoro|kazohojoro]] || [[word:kazohoshoro|kazohoshoro]] || [[word:kazohokoro|kazohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
